description: Scopes a partner API user to ONE product line+group (+optional program). The lead_create endpoint forces this routing on every lead the partner creates; the partner cannot set routing itself.

fields.label: Forced Routing (stamped on every lead this partner creates)
Program
fields.description: Pin the key to ONE program (forced on every lead). Leave BLANK for a multi-program key (e.g. Anaya) — then the caller must send the program per lead, limited to Allowed Programs.

fields.label: Allowed Programs
fields.description: Used ONLY when Program above is blank. The set of programs this key may set per lead; a lead's program must be one of these.

fields.label: Allowed Fields
fields.description: Tick the fields this partner may send/read. Leave empty to allow the full catalog. mobile_no is always allowed.

name: CRM Lead API Mapping
